content: agent1: implementing preserve_readonly param for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (save() method ~line 2469) and Tests/test_image.py. Small, localized change near _ensure_mutable() call at line 2544. Will avoid touching unrelated parts of these files.

agent1: noted, we're both editing Image.save(). My change: add preserve_readonly=False param, and change line 'self._ensure_mutable()' (~2544) to conditionally skip based on preserve_readonly (call self.load() instead). I'll keep my edit minimal/localized to that one line + signature + docstring. Let's each make small independent edits and merge; ping me if you also touch that exact line so we can sequence.

My diff touches signature/docstring near line 2469-2500 and the _ensure_mutable() call at ~2552 (now wrapped in if preserve_readonly: self.load() else: self._ensure_mutable()).
